title: Main story line with missions + side quests
short: Main story line with missions + side quests
depends: none (builds on the existing `Quests` system)

title: Higher‑fidelity models (character, monsters, trees, stones, environment)
short: Higher‑fidelity models
depends: best done **after Task 4** (lighting) so materials read well

title: More + more‑realistic shadows & lighting
short: More + more‑realistic shadows & lighting
depends: none (do **before** Task 3 ideally)

title: More + higher‑quality animation (actions + environment)
short: More + higher‑quality animation
depends: lighter if done **after Task 3** (animates the better models)

title: More sound effects + per‑location background ambience
short: More sound effects + per‑location background ambience
depends: none (slots onto zones + the existing `Sfx`/`Music`)

title: Russian language support (selectable at start + in pause settings)
short: Russian language support
depends: none. **Recommended FIRST** so later tasks add bilingual strings as they go (see Golden Rule 9)

title: Extract the changelog into its own `CHANGELOG.md`
short: Extract the changelog into its own `CHANGELOG.md`
depends: none. **Do this first** — it is cheap, unblocks every later run (no more 100‑line diffs to `TODO.md` just to log a release), and large projects with good reviews universally keep history out of the planning doc

title: Modularize the codebase + a production build/test/CI toolchain for agentic edits
short: Modularize the codebase + a production build/test/CI toolchain for agentic edits
depends: none, but it is **foundational** — doing it early makes every later task smaller, more targeted, and safer to edit/build/test autonomously

title: Fix logical, code & UI bugs (pathing, resource caps, pickup, collision, projectiles, swing) + a deeper test net
short: Fix logical, code & UI bugs
depends: none. Lighter to land **after Task 9** (smaller modules = surgical fixes), but must not wait on it

title: Brighter, more cheerful art direction + a larger visible play area
short: Brighter, more cheerful art direction + a larger visible play area
depends: plays best **with/after Task 4** (lighting) since exposure/tone mapping interact; coordinate the two

title: Deep item & equipment system (Skyrim‑grade) with visible worn gear + a real inventory
short: Deep item & equipment system
depends: none; pairs naturally with **Task 14** (skills/levels share the stat‑recompute pipeline) — keep the data layer compatible

title: Minimap + full‑screen world map with locations, NPCs, search & a guided waypoint
short: Minimap + full‑screen world map with locations, NPCs, search & a guided waypoint
depends: none (reads `ZONES`/`LOCATIONS`/`NPC_DATA`); complements the story tracker from Task 2

title: Skill & leveling system (Skyrim‑grade) with 3‑skill fusion, a quick‑access bar & boss‑only skills
short: Skill & leveling system
depends: pairs with **Task 12** (shared stat pipeline); benefits from the Task 13 HUD for the toolbar. Keep save schema coordinated with Task 12

title: Cloud saves to Google Drive (manual + 5‑min autosave via `appDataFolder`, rolling 1‑hour history)
short: Cloud saves to Google Drive
depends: the existing `serializeGame`/`applySave` + `SAVE_VERSION`; do it **after** any task that changes the save schema (so the cloud format is stable)

title: Responsive, mobile‑first HUD & menu overhaul (auto‑fit at any resolution; one‑thumb combat; drag‑and‑drop skill slots)
short: Responsive, mobile‑first HUD & menu overhaul
depends: none directly, but it **touches** the minimap/map button (Task 13), the skill quick‑bar + `SkillsUI` (Task 14), the audio mixer (Task 6) and the cloud‑saves controls (Task 15). Pairs naturally with **Task 20** (map) — both rework HUD chrome — and **Task 18** (save management UI lives in the same menus). Best done **before** Task 20 so the map button removal and minimap‑tap entry point are settled first

title: Durable session persistence (progress + Google sign‑in survive reload and desktop⇄mobile mode switches)
short: Durable session persistence
depends: the existing `serializeGame`/`applySave` + `localStorage` prefs (Tasks 9/15). Coordinate with **Task 18** (save management) and **Task 15** (cloud auth) — they share the persistence layer. Do this **before/with** Task 18

title: Cloud‑saves browser fix + multiple manual save slots with full management (rename / delete / load)
short: Cloud‑saves browser fix + multiple manual save slots with full management
depends: the save layer (Tasks 9/15) and **Task 17** (durable session) — build this **after/with** Task 17 so slots and the auto‑session share one store. Coordinate `SAVE_VERSION` with any task that changes the schema

title: Replace the score system with the experience (XP) system
short: Replace the score system with the experience
depends: the **XP/leveling** layer (Task 14, `src/data/skills.js`: `xpToNext`/`gainXp`/`player.progress`). None else

title: Map subsystem fixes (fit‑to‑screen full map, un‑mirror the minimap, arrow‑shaped target pointer, fully readable labels)
short: Map subsystem fixes
depends: the map layer (Task 13: `WorldMap`/`WorldMapUI`, `drawZoneScene`, `mmPlayer`, `resolveWaypoint`, the compass). Pairs with **Task 16** (HUD chrome — the map button is removed there and the map opens from the minimap tap)

title: Unified inventory for potions & ingredients (30 slots, drag‑and‑drop potion slotting, sellable items, dedicated alchemist NPC)
short: Unified inventory for potions & ingredients
depends: the item/inventory system (Task 12: `Inventory`/`invAdd`/`invCap`/ the tabbed bag), the potion belt + materials (`POTION_SLOTS`, `player.potions`, `player.materials`), the Shop (Task 12/`POTION_STOCK`), and the drag utility from **Task 16**. Coordinate `SAVE_VERSION` with Tasks 18/19

title: Environment rewrite: stable resource generation + natural road‑edge teleporters
short: Environment rewrite: stable resource generation + natural road‑edge teleporters
depends: the world/zone systems (`buildWorld`, `setupZoneContent`, `ZoneManager`, `ResourceNode`, `populateAdventure`/`populateWildResources`, `CONFIG.maxResourceNodes`, the portal layout + hub `roadLanes`). None else

title: Persist Google Drive sign-in across reloads (true silent re-auth; no unprompted dialog)
short: Persist Google Drive sign-in across reloads
depends: Task 15 (Google Drive cloud saves — `CloudSave`/`CloudUI`/ `makeGoogleDriveClient`) and Task 17 (durable session — the `Session` cookie/hint store, `silentAuthDecision`, `signInSilent`). None else

title: Russian grammatical morphology (Android-style declensions, gender & plural agreement)
short: Russian grammatical morphology
depends: Task 7 (the i18n layer — `LOCALES` / `t()` / `interp()` / `plural()` in `src/core/i18n.js`, the `RU` data-table dictionary + resolvers). None else

title: Worn helmets: a distinct, real-looking helm per item (not one rarity-tinted dome)
short: Worn helmets: a distinct, real-looking helm per item
depends: Task 12 (the worn-gear system + the `helmet` slot), Task 3 (models/materials), Task 4 (lighting). Honours the shared bar above (Tasks 25–35)

title: Worn chest pieces: layered breastplates & robes per item
short: Worn chest pieces: layered breastplates & robes per item
depends: Task 12 (the `breastplate` slot), Task 3, Task 4. Shared bar above

title: Worn pauldrons: shoulder armour that sits on the shoulder (not in the chest)
short: Worn pauldrons: shoulder armour that sits on the shoulder
depends: Task 12 (the `pauldrons` slot), Task 3, Task 4. Shared bar above

title: Worn gloves & gauntlets
short: Worn gloves & gauntlets
depends: Task 12 (the `gloves` slot), Task 3, Task 4. Shared bar above

title: Worn belts
short: Worn belts
depends: Task 12 (the `belt` slot), Task 3, Task 4. Shared bar above

title: Worn boots
short: Worn boots
depends: Task 12 (the `boots` slot), Task 3, Task 4. Shared bar above

title: Worn cloaks
short: Worn cloaks
depends: Task 12 (the `cloak` slot), Task 3, Task 4, Task 5 (`_animateCloak`). Shared bar above

title: Held weapons: real wand / bow / staff / sword / axe / dagger in hand
short: Held weapons: real wand / bow / staff / sword / axe / dagger in hand
depends: Task 12 (weapon items + the two hand slots), Task 3, Task 4, and Task 34 (the attacks the weapon moves with — pair them). Shared bar above

title: Visible jewelry: necklace + rings on the character (additive)
short: Visible jewelry: necklace + rings on the character
depends: Task 12 (the `necklace` + `ring1`/`ring2` slots), Task 3, Task 4. Shared bar above. **Net-new scope** (jewelry currently renders no worn mesh)

title: Rewrite weapon firing & melee attack animations from scratch (MMORPG-grade)
short: Rewrite weapon firing & melee attack animations from scratch
depends: Task 5 (the `Swing` state machine) and Task 10 (the impact-frame fix) — this **replaces** them; Task 32 (the weapon meshes it animates); the `Projectile` / `Hazard` combat system. Pairs with Task 32 (build them together)

title: Full-loadout fit & clipping integration (no stray textures across all gear + the new attacks)
short: Full-loadout fit & clipping integration
depends: the worn-category tasks (25–33) **and** the combat-animation rewrite (Task 34) — this is the **final integration pass** that runs after them. Builds on the named **fit table** each category task introduces

title: Customizable on-screen control layout (drag any control anywhere; saved + restored)
short: Customizable on-screen control layout
depends: Task 16 (the responsive HUD + the reusable Pointer-Events drag controller / `dragSlotReducer`, `src/game.js` ~5503-5710) and **Task 39** (the HUD region/layer system — do this **after** Task 39 so custom positions build on non-overlapping defaults). Coordinate `SAVE_VERSION` with any task that changes the schema

title: Exit/enter fullscreen control in the settings menu
short: Exit/enter fullscreen control in the settings menu
depends: Task 16 (the `Fullscreen` module — `toggle` / `active` / `supported` / `lockLandscape` / `unlockOrientation`, `src/game.js` ~10622-10686; the `#fsBtn` HUD button). None else

title: Fix: NPCs are only talkable in the hub — spawn quest-givers in their home zones
short: Fix: NPCs are only talkable in the hub
depends: the world/zone + quest systems (`setupZoneContent` / `populateAdventure`, `QuestGiver` / `Dialogue`, `NPC_DATA` / `LOCATIONS`, `ZoneManager`). None else

title: Collision-free HUD: a real region/layer system so no widget or button overlaps
short: Collision-free HUD: a real region/layer system so no widget or button overlaps
depends: Task 16 (the HUD markup + z-index tiers + the touch action arc). Pairs with **Task 36** (do this **before** the free-form control editor so custom positions start from clean regions). None else

title: Travelling vendors in every land: merchant, blacksmith & apothecary reachable outside the hub
short: Travelling vendors in every land: merchant, blacksmith & apothecary reachable outside the hub
depends: Task 38 (the zone-aware NPC spawn this generalizes — `spawnZoneNpcs` / `questGiversForZone` / `landmarkZone`, the `zone` field on `LOCATIONS`, `src/game.js` ~4798-4865), Task 12 (the `Shop` / gear economy and the `Merchant` / `Blacksmith`), Task 21 (the `Alchemist` apothecary vendor + sellable consumables), Task 22 (the road-edge zone entrances the camp is placed beside), and Tasks 13/20 (the minimap + world-map markers and the guided waypoint). All shipped

title: Retire file saves; make Google Drive the primary, user-friendly save path
short: Retire file saves; make Google Drive the primary, user-friendly save path
depends: Task 15 (Google Drive cloud saves — `CloudSave` / `CloudUI` / `makeGoogleDriveClient`), Task 17 (the durable auto-resume session + the `SaveSlots` base) and Task 18 (the `SaveSlots` / `SavesUI` *Manage Saves* screen, where file export/import currently lives). **Pairs with / best done with or after Task 23** (persist Google sign-in across reloads — the silent re-auth that makes "stay signed in" actually work). Coordinate `SAVE_VERSION` with any schema-changing task (e.g. Task 36)

title: Make the Playwright E2E suite fast & robust (de‑flake slow specs, deterministic waits, reuse the build, rebalance sharding)
short: Make the Playwright E2E suite fast & robust
depends: Task 9 (the Vite build + the Vitest/Playwright pipeline + the staged `.github/workflows/ci.yml`) and Task 16 (the **Galaxy S24 Ultra** device profiles the specs run under). Independent of the worn‑gear/animation family (Tasks 25–35) and of Tasks 40/41. **Best done early** — it shortens every later run's verify/CI loop
